response.justification: Maria has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including some JVM-related work (Java, C++ for IDE tooling), but lacks clear evidence of deep expertise in enterprise Java/Kotlin ecosystems, Spring, or IDE internals. Her background is more aligned with general full-stack, backend, and tooling roles rather than JVM/IDE specialization.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship and TDD experience, which aligns with IDE quality and maintainability standards
Proven track record in architecting and delivering complex systems, including low-latency and real-time applications
Demonstrated ability to work across the stack and adapt to new technologies, suggesting flexibility and learning agility
concerns: Limited explicit experience with enterprise Java/Kotlin ecosystems (Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate) or JVM tooling internals
No direct mention of IDE development, language server protocols, or developer tooling beyond general developer tooling
Primary expertise in JavaScript, TypeScript, and Dlang, with only tangential JVM-related experience (Java, C++)
